title: Overlay merges override base with tombstones and snapshots
description:
## Intent
As a console user, I want overlay data to override base reads when newer so I can see remote changes instantly.

## Gherkin
Feature: Overlay merge
  Scenario: Overlay overrides base
    Given a base issue "kbs-123" updated_at "2026-03-01T00:00:00Z"
    And an overlay issue "kbs-123" with overlay_ts "2026-03-02T00:00:00Z"
    When I resolve issue "kbs-123"
    Then the overlay issue is returned

  Scenario: Tombstone hides issue
    Given a base issue "kbs-123" updated_at "2026-03-01T00:00:00Z"
    And a tombstone for "kbs-123" with ts "2026-03-02T00:00:00Z"
    When I resolve issue "kbs-123"
    Then the issue is treated as deleted

  Scenario: Console snapshot uses overlay
    Given the console snapshot is generated
    And an overlay issue "kbs-123" is newer than base
    When I request the snapshot issues
    Then the issue data reflects the overlay version

## Definition of Done
- Overlay merge rules implemented in both runtimes and applied to list/show/snapshot paths.
creator: ryan.porter
